# Rock examples

Each file is self-contained — run with `rock run examples/<name>.rk`.

| File | Demonstrates |
|---|---|
| [hello.rk](hello.rk) | the basics: variables, functions, interpolation |
| [fizzbuzz.rk](fizzbuzz.rk) | control flow, match guards |
| [todo.rk](todo.rk) | maps, structs, methods |
| [http_status.rk](http_status.rk) | HTTP client, error handling |
| [primes.rk](primes.rk) | iteration, pipelines, math |
| [json_pipeline.rk](json_pipeline.rk) | JSON in/out, transformations |
| [chat_room.rk](chat_room.rk) | TCP server, channels, tasks |
| [calculator.rk](calculator.rk) | recursive descent parser written in Rock |
